reviews.comment:
Fui a cargar combustible y me puse del lado contrario al tanque de mi auto porque el surtidor q quedaba bien había fila de 10 motos... se acerca una sra rubia con el uniforme de la estación y me dice que me tengo que poner atrás de la fila de motos porque la manguera no llegaba ... Jamás en ninguna estación del país me paso eso... una Vergüenza !!! NO RECOMIENDO ...

(Translated by Google)
I went to fill up with gas and stood on the opposite side of the tank from my car because the pump that was convenient had a line of 10 motorcycles... a blonde woman in a station uniform approached me and told me I had to stand behind the line of motorcycles because the hose couldn't reach... I've never had that happen at any other gas station in the country... a disgrace!!! I DO NOT RECOMMEND IT...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13088641644358785510/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURvcE9yYUFnEAE
